title: Best settings baseline
summary: A dependable starting point for Action 6. Change only what the scene requires.
table: 8K for crop/detail; 4K Custom for multi-platform reframing
60 fps for action or half-speed; 120/240 only for slow motion
D-Log M when you will color grade
Raise only when blur is worse than noise
Use ~1/200 for rough EIS action; 180° only for controlled motion
Horizon modes for roll; Off on tripod or external workflow
tips: High bitrate is the sensible default when storage is available.
Use f/2.0 for low light; use a smaller aperture when you need closer focus or starburst rendering.
warning: There is no universal best setting. Light level, mount vibration, delivery format and grading workflow change the answer.
